items.definition_en: An app is a program you use on your computer or phone.
items.example_en: I downloaded a new app for music.

items.definition_en: Software is the programs and applications on your computer.
items.example_en: He installed new software on his laptop.

items.definition_en: A file is something you save or open on your computer.
items.example_en: She opened the file to read the document.

items.definition_en: A folder is a place to keep files on a computer.
items.example_en: All my photos are in this folder.

items.definition_en: A program is a set of instructions for a computer.
items.example_en: I use a program to edit pictures.

items.definition_en: An icon is a small picture you click to open something.
items.example_en: Click the icon to start the application.

items.definition_en: A window is the area you see a program on the screen.
items.example_en: I have two windows open on my desktop.

items.definition_en: A menu is a list of choices in a program.
items.example_en: Select the option from the menu.

items.definition_en: A button is something you press to do something in an app.
items.example_en: Press the button to print the page.

items.definition_en: A tab is a part of a window where you can see more pages.
items.example_en: I opened a new tab to search for information.

items.definition_en: An update is a new version of a program or app.
items.example_en: I need to install the update to use the app.

items.definition_en: A user account is what you use to log in to programs.
items.example_en: She created a user account for the website.

items.definition_en: A backup is a copy of your files in case you lose them.
items.example_en: I made a backup of my important data.

items.definition_en: An app store is a place online to get new apps.
items.example_en: He found the game in the app store.

items.definition_en: A template is a ready-made layout for documents or projects.
items.example_en: I used a template to write my letter.

items.definition_en: A plugin is a small program that adds new features.
items.example_en: To use that music player, you need a plugin.

items.definition_en: A shortcut is a quick way to open a file or start a program.
items.example_en: I put a shortcut to the app on my desktop.

items.definition_en: A tool is something in software that helps you do a job.
items.example_en: The eraser tool helps remove mistakes.

items.definition_en: A notification is a message that tells you something new.
items.example_en: I got a notification about a new message.

items.definition_en: Settings are options you can change in a program.
items.example_en: Open the settings to adjust the volume.
